title: S1PR3 expression independently predicts the cumulative incidence of relapse in adult B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia: a single-center retrospective analysis.
snippet: This study aims to investigate the predictive value of S1PR3 for the 3-year cumulative incidence of relapse (CIR) in adult patients with B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (B-ALL). This retrospective study enrolled 285 adult patients with B-ALL and 13 healthy controls from January 2019 through January 2022. S1PR3 expression was analyzed in leukemia cell li...
